articles.title: People’s March contributes to Congress’s people-centric governance, accessibility to govt fully ensured: Bhatti on three years of padayatra
articles.description: Two and a half years into the Congress Government’s tenure in Telangana, Deputy Chief Minister Bhatti Vikramarka Mallu reflects on how the ‘People’s March’ (padayatra) he had undertaken from March 16, 2023 from Pippiri village in Boath constituency of Adilabad district covering 1,364 kms touching 37 assembly constituencies has shaped governance. The mass contact programme created a direct bond with citizens and laid the foundation for the Praja Palana (People’s Governance) model. In an exclusive interview to The Hindu, Mr. Bhatti explains how promises made during the march — on housing, agriculture, education, employment, and irrigation — are being implemented, and how the Six Guarantees continue to anchor welfare delivery despite fiscal challenges

articles.title: Attacks on nuclear facilities ‘will end life’ in gulf cities not Tehran: Iran’s FM after US-Israel strikes on Bushehr
articles.description: Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi warned that further strikes on the Bushehr nuclear power plant could lead to radioactive fallout affecting GCC capitals. He slammed Western silence over the attacks, which he claims have occurred multiple times.

articles.title: Follower-turned-whistleblower of arrested Nashik godman reveals shocking details
articles.description: Self-styled godman Ashok Kharat is currently lodged in police custody in a rape and black magic case; allegations against him in the high-profile case has caused ripples in Maharashtra politics

articles.title: After fighting malware for decades, this cybersecurity veteran is now hacking drones
articles.description: Mikko Hyppönen is one of the most recognizable faces of the cybersecurity industry. After fighting computer viruses, worms, and malware, for more than 35 years, he tells TechCrunch why he is now working on systems to stop killer drones.

topStories.description: Tehran says it is the fourth attack near the nuclear plant amid the US-Israel war on Iran.

topStories.title: Quote of the Day: John D. Rockefeller urges bold choices — ‘Don’t be afraid to give up…’
topStories.description: Rockefeller’s words remind us to think big and act with courage. They encourage people to trust their abilities, embrace change, and not fear leaving their comfort zone.

topStories.title: Blindfolded, Made To Kneel: What Happened Last Time Iran Held US Personnel
topStories.description: Iran shot down a US F-15E fighter jet, marking the first confirmed loss of an American aircraft inside Iranian territory since the war began.

topStories.title: Quote of the Day by Ray Dalio: Why investors chase the past
topStories.description: American billionnare Ray Dalio's quote is really a warning against recency bias—the habit of mistaking what has just worked for what will keep working.

topStories.title: Magnitude 6.0 Earthquake Strikes Off North Indonesia
topStories.description: A 6.0 magnitude quake struck off Indonesia's remote northern Talaud islands on Saturday, the US Geological Survey (USGS) said, but there were no immediate reports of casualties or damage.

topStories.title: 'Baseless': Pakistan Rejects Claims Of Failed US-Iran Mediation Bid
topStories.description: Islamabad says media misread briefing amid rising tensions; insists outreach between Washington and Tehran is still underway.

topStories.title: Amid War With Iran, UAE Asks Pakistan To Repay $2 Billion Loan: Report
topStories.description: The UAE recently asked for the immediate return of the funds in the wake of the recent situation in the Middle East following the US-Israel war on Iran.

topStories.title: What we know so far about the search for missing US airman in Iran
topStories.description: US and Iranian forces are searching for a missing American crew member after a US warplane was shot down.

topStories.title: Bikaner Bhujia may get pricier: US-Iran war disrupts namkeen exports to Gulf, Europe
topStories.description: The manufacturers of Bikaner's namkeen industry now fear that the economic instability caused by the US-Iran war in West Asia may increase the costs of the products.

topStories.title: 'Definitely carried out by Zionists': Iran denies involvement in attack on US Embassy in Riyadh
topStories.description: Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps condemned the March attack on the US embassy in Riyadh, denying involvement and blaming Israel. Following drone strikes on Oman, Iran claimed these were ‘false flag’ operations. Tensions rise as Iran rejects a US ceasefire proposal amid escalating conflict.

topStories.title: Iran shoots down two US jets: Ex-airmen explains how ‘downed’ pilot must avoid enemy capture
topStories.description: In a rare assault against the US, Iran reportedly shot down two American military aircraft on Friday — F15-E Strike Eagle fighter jet and A-10 attack aircraft. How will the “missing” pilot avoid enemy capture? Ex-airmen explains.

dailyNews.title: ‘Extremely difficult’ times: Senegal bans public officials' travel as Iran war oil shock strains govt's budget
dailyNews.description: Senegal's government has suspended non-essential foreign travel for ministers amid rising oil prices due to the US-Israeli conflict with Iran. Prime Minister Sonko emphasized the need for essential missions only, citing budget strains.

dailyNews.title: Child of Chinese illegal immigrants charged with planting explosive at US military base

dailyNews.title: LeAnn Rimes’ emotional reaction to jaw release therapy sparks widespread buzz
